description: Firewall rules update requires both inbound and outbound rule arrays once confirmed, then PUTs them. Both languages send only inbound/outbound (Go no longer emits empty inbound_policy/outbound_policy strings, which the API treats as optional).

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This replaces Cloud Firewall rules. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: rejects a non-positive firewall_id once confirmed
cases.expect_error: firewall_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: replaces the rules with empty rulesets
